title: task
description: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:719 - verify_icmpv6_checksum uses local_addr instead of ip_header.dst. When packets are sent to multicast addresses (e.g. solicited-node multicast ff02::1:ffXX:XXXX for Neighbor Solicitation), checksum verification fails because the sender computed checksum with multicast dst but we verify with unicast local_addr. This breaks Neighbor Discovery when NS is sent to solicited-node multicast. Fix: change local_addr to &ip_header.dst on line 719.
